channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Touring Trump’s Washington: How the president is putting his imprint on the nation’s capital
item.description: America is celebrating its 250th year, and Washington, D.C., is undergoing significant changes under President Donald Trump.

item.title: Supreme Court clears way for Trump administration to revive restrictive policy for asylum seekers
The Supreme Court lets the Trump administration end legal protections for Haitians and Syrians
